task_params.subject: Candidate feedback summary
body_points: Thank her for the time yesterday and follow-up patience
Summarize that panel feedback was consistently positive
Highlight strong stakeholder communication and thoughtful answers
Note one concern about ramp time on technical systems
Recommend moving the candidate to the final round
Offer to discuss details live if helpful

attributes.subject: Candidate feedback summary
attributes.body: Hi Iris — just checking whether you had a chance to send over the candidate feedback summary you mentioned. Once I have it, I can align with the rest of the panel and decide next steps. Thanks.

attributes.subject: Interview panel timing
attributes.body: I moved the debrief by thirty minutes so everyone can join. Let me know if that still works.

attributes.subject: Offer approval routing
attributes.body: Can you confirm whether finance has signed off on the compensation band yet?
